# Let's read the file content
path = "/mnt/data/file-G3u6G4ubjhx41aVguwQVhu-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

import re, json, textwrap
text = open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8").read()
# Find all quoted segments inside double quotes
matches = [(m.group(1), m.start(1), m.end(1)) for m in re.finditer(r'"([^"]+)"', text)]
matches

# Verify slices correspond
ok = True
for s,start,end in matches:
    if text[start:end] != s:
        ok = False
        print("Mismatch at", start, end)
ok

import json
citations = [
    {"span_start": 326, "span_end": 390, "span_text": "وَمَن يَكُن حَلِيمًا وَمَن يَسْرِف فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ غَنِيٌ عَنْهُ", "citation_type": "Aya"},
    {"span_start": 505, "span_end": 532, "span_text": "لا بُخلَ فيما يُعتَدُّ بِهِ", "citation_type": "Hadeeth"},
    {"span_start": 658, "span_end": 764, "span_text": "وَلَوْ أَنَّ قُرَيْشًا يُفْتَنُونَ فِي الَّذِي يُوعَدُونَ مِن شَرِّ الدَّجَالِ وَرِقَامٍ وَنِفَاقٍ وَجَمعٍ", "citation_type": "Aya"},
    {"span_start": 882, "span_end": 969, "span_text": "لا تُبَخِلِ المَرءَ في حَياتِهِ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُبَخِلُ مَن يُبَخِلُ وَيُعطي مَن يُعطي", "citation_type": "Hadeeth"},
    {"span_start": 1199, "span_end": 1263, "span_text": "وَمَن يَكُن حَلِيمًا وَمَن يَسْرِف فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ غَنِيٌ عَنْهُ", "citation_type": "Aya"},
]
print(json.dumps({"citations": citations}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
